description: Routing and sovereignty-hardening roadmap for HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts.

tasks.title: Finalize hpc-routing-spine.schema.json
tasks.summary: Lock down the JSON Schema for the routing spine with objectKinds, routeEntry, mathConstraints, and docHints.
tasks.notes: Ensure schema matches existing invariants/metrics vocab and includes tier/repo enums consistent with the constellation.

tasks.title: Bootstrap hpc-routing-spine-v1.json instance
tasks.summary: Populate the routing spine instance with routes for moodContract, eventContract, regionContractCard, seedContractCard, and bci-geometry-tileset.
tasks.notes: Each (objectKind, tier) must map to a unique (repo, schemaRef, defaultTargetPath) triple with invariants, metrics, constraints, and phase.

tasks.title: Align routing spine with invariant and metric spines
tasks.summary: Ensure all invariant and metric codes referenced in routes exist in the canonical invariant and entertainment metric spines.
tasks.notes: Valid invariant codes: CIC, MDI, AOS, RRM, FCF, LSG, HVF, DET, SPR, SHCI, RWF. Valid metric codes: UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR.

tasks.title: Populate mathConstraints catalog in routing spine
tasks.summary: Add named mathConstraints entries (e.g., sprFromInvariants.v1, moodUECARRTradeoff.v1) and associate them with contract families.
tasks.notes: These constraints are references to separate, versioned formulas and do not need full math expressions at this stage.

tasks.title: Generate routing spine documentation from instance
tasks.summary: Generate human-readable Markdown docs from hpc-routing-spine-v1.json for maintainers and external AI-chat platforms.
tasks.notes: Docs should list objectKinds, allowed tiers, repos, schemaRefs, invariants, metrics, and constraint IDs.

tasks.title: Commit repo-manifest-v1.json schema
tasks.summary: Introduce a canonical schema for per-repo manifests capturing repoName, tier, allowedObjectKinds, policies, and ciChecks.
tasks.notes: Schema should be reusable across all constellation repos with consistent enums for repoName and tier.

tasks.title: Normalize all repo manifests to v1 schema
tasks.summary: Create or update per-repo manifest files to conform to repo-manifest-v1.json and accurately reflect each repo's jurisdiction.
tasks.notes: Set implicitDeny and allowedObjectKinds to match real capabilities; ensure schemaWhitelist and defaultPaths are populated.

tasks.title: Add routingSpineRef and routing policies to manifests
tasks.summary: Set routingSpineRef and enable key policies (POL003, POL004, POL006) in Tier-1 and Tier-2 repos.
tasks.notes: routingSpineRef should point to schemas/hpc-routing-spine-v1.json; policies enforce schemaRef and target metadata presence.

tasks.title: Cross-check manifests against routing spine
tasks.summary: Ensure each route's objectKind and tier are permitted by the target repo's manifest and that tier classifications match.
tasks.notes: Resolve discrepancies by updating either the route or the manifest and rerun linting until no conflicts remain.

tasks.title: Complete hpc-routing-validator crate
tasks.summary: Implement core Rust library that loads manifests and routing spine, validates uniqueness and sovereignty, and exposes resolve_route.
tasks.notes: validate_routing_system must return structured error codes: ERR_ROUTE_CONFLICT, ERR_MANIFEST_IMPLICIT_DENY, ERR_SOVEREIGNTY_VIOLATION, etc.

tasks.title: Add optional WASM surface to hpc-routing-validator
tasks.summary: Expose JSON-in/JSON-out WASM bindings for validation and route resolution.
tasks.notes: Guard with a 'wasm' feature; functions should accept JSON strings and return JSON strings for easy embedding.

tasks.title: Create hpc-routing-lint CLI crate
tasks.summary: Implement CLI tool that scans repo manifests and routing spine, runs validation, and emits human and JSON reports.
tasks.notes: CLI must exit non-zero when any validation errors exist; suitable for use in GitHub Actions.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for routing validator
tasks.summary: Cover core routing cases: uniqueness, implicitDeny semantics, tier mismatches, and missing constraint references.
tasks.notes: Use small in-memory manifests and spine structures for fast test runs.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for hpc-routing-lint CLI
tasks.summary: Validate CLI behavior end-to-end with fixture directories and ensure exit codes and JSON reports are correct.
tasks.notes: Include both successful and failure scenarios, including route conflicts and sovereignty violations.

tasks.title: Add routing-lint GitHub Actions workflow
tasks.summary: Configure CI to build the workspace and run hpc-routing-lint on pushes and pull requests to main.
tasks.notes: Use caching for Cargo; treat any non-zero exit from hpc-routing-lint as a hard fail.

tasks.title: Add schema validation job for routing spine
tasks.summary: Validate routing spine instance against its schema as part of CI.
tasks.notes: Ensure any structural changes to the spine are caught before merge.

tasks.title: Add schema validation job for repo manifests
tasks.summary: Validate all repo-manifest files against repo-manifest-v1.json in CI.
tasks.notes: Run alongside routing lint to catch pure schema drift separately from routing conflicts.

tasks.title: Publish public-facing routing spine surface for external AI
tasks.summary: Expose a minimal, AI-safe routing surface summarizing objectKinds, tiers, repos, and schemaRefs.
tasks.notes: Intended for external AI-chat platforms that cannot access private repos but need valid routing triples.

tasks.title: Cross-check AI authoring contracts against routing spine
tasks.summary: Ensure AI authoring request/response schemas require objectKind, tier, targetRepo, and schemaRef, and validate them via the routing validator.
tasks.notes: CI should fail when AI authoring envelopes specify routing tuples that do not match hpc-routing-spine-v1.json.
